450 ROUTE_RSDNT_EHR_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_EHR_CD Patient Trans - Electronic Health Record CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver was via electronic health record. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
